title: Chief Brand & Aesthetic Officer
summary: The Chief Brand & Aesthetic Officer shapes how Neuroartan looks, sounds, feels, and is recognized across every public surface.
biography: This executive seat is open. Neuroartan has defined the role before appointing a public holder so the standard is clear from the beginning.
The role protects the company’s visual identity, naming discipline, design language, and the way ICOS is understood by the world.
This profile remains role-first until a human executive is hired, verified, and approved for publication.
mandate: Build a brand system that makes Neuroartan unmistakable: clear in language, restrained in design, precise in identity, and directly connected to ICOS.
